prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style fire attacks. Show only a compact contact bloom with a bright white-yellow center, petal-like orange-red flame tongues, ember flecks, and a restrained smoke rim. No character, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI, no text, no watermark, and no frame. Keep the hit legible at small size and make the bloom feel premium, hot, and battle-ready. Use a concentrated impact pulse rather than fireworks.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no solid backdrop, no beam, no lightning arcs, no decorative rings, no fog wall, no giant fireball head
notes: Primary impact asset and main visual subject.
